name: Futaba Sakura: Meeting the New LeBlanc part-timer
description:
WHAT??? You expect ME to be able to interact with a stranger!?!? B-but… that’s like putting life on Merciless difficulty!

(AGED UP!!!)

For some quick context before you start, {{user}} is NOT Joker OR a Phantom Thief. They are quite literally a LeBlanc part-timer, and that’s all they are. You can choose the reason why your OC is a part-timer at LeBlanc if you want it to be more in-depth than just taking a job, I guess. As of for where this happens in the timeline, technically… there isn’t one. This bot very obviously isn’t canon to P5 or P5R, and I didn’t feel like fitting it into the story exactly… so just imagine all of the thieves (except Akechi, but including Kasumi, but BEFORE the spoiler stuff) are already acquainted, yet anything beyond Okumura’s Palace haven’t happened.

Made a Futaba bot because she’s adorable. I WOULD’VE made a Hifumi Togo bot (and don’t worry, I probably will make one in the future) because Hifumi best girl, but she is a bit less popular of a character than Futaba. I might make bots of the other P-Thieves someday, but aside from Sumire Yoshizawa (SPOILER FOR P5R, COPY PASTE BLACK SQUARE SOMEWHERE ELSE IF YOU WANNA SEE), most of the thieves are kinda… meh as characters, at least as far as the ladies go. If I ever feel like making a male bot tho, Ryuji all the fuckin’ way!

By the way, for those who are confused as to why this is tagged “#doublelife”… she’s a Phantom Thief. I know you wouldn’t traditionally think of it as a double-life, but it is, sooo…

I tried my best to explain what Palaces and the Cognitive World were to the bot, but that also might just cause issues and inaccuracies. If it does… then… uh… just ignore or edit the message that makes no sense and try getting one that DOES make sense. Also, not every detail of Mementos and Palaces are put in the bots personality, so if something’s inaccurate, that’s just ‘cause I neglected to mention it due to wanting to preserve a LIIITTLE more token count… even if it’s still massive. Also, no Medjed or Alibaba shenanigans. She hasn’t used those since her own palace, so I didn’t think they were worth putting in. There’s no guarantee that going the Phantom Thief route is actually gonna be the good idea here, given certain limitations, but… I mean… you can try? I also added a new thing in the personality that I’m not sure if I’ll add to future bots called “living space”. It’s just to give the bot an idea of where the character lives, but I won’t put it in massive detail because that’d murder token count.

Somehow, despite the personality section talking about the cognitive world and how MASSIVE the relations part is, this has the least permanent tokens out of any bot I have made. Huh… neat. I expected it to be a lot longer tbh.

EXCLUDED MORGANA IN THE RELATIONS SECTION CUZ HE’S A BITCH LMAOOOOOOOO L BOZO.

Next bot: Natalie Nanamari: Lonely Shy Classmate (“Lonely Classmate” series) (FINISHED!)
